query:
WITH
    overlapping AS (
        SELECT
            t.trip_id,
            u.user_haul_id
        FROM
            trips t
            INNER JOIN user_hauls u ON t.period @> u.period
            AND u.fiskeridir_vessel_id = t.fiskeridir_vessel_id
        WHERE
            t.trip_id = ANY ($1::BIGINT[])
            AND u.haul_id IS NULL
    )
UPDATE user_hauls u
SET
    trip_id = o.trip_id
FROM
    overlapping o
WHERE
    o.user_haul_id = u.user_haul_id
